        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
      ∈ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
      ⇒ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
        ⟩
        ∈ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ⇒ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩]
Δ ⊢ y ~ y'

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y, y': tm Γ Y
q₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
q₂: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f
r: Δ
⊢ ((((⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      ⟩
      ∈ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
      ⇒ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
        ⟩
        ∈ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ⇒ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩]
Δ ⊢ y ~ y'

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y, y': tm Γ Y
q₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
q₂: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f
r: Δ
⊢ ((((⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      ⟩
      ∈ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
      ⇒ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
        ⟩
        ∈ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ⇒ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩]
Δ
∧ ((((⟨ π₂
          (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      ⟩
      ∈ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
      ⇒ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((... ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
        π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
        ∈ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ⇒ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩]
⊢ y ~ y'

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y, y': tm Γ Y
q₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
q₂: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f
r: Δ
⊢ ((((⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      ⟩
      ∈ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
      ⇒ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
        ⟩
        ∈ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ⇒ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩]
Δ
∧ ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      ⟩,
    π₁
      (π₁
         (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
    ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩ ]tm
      ]tm ]tm ]tm]
   ⇒ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
     [⟨ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
        π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩,
      π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
      ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩ ]tm
        ]tm ]tm ]tm]
     ⇒ (π₂
          (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
        π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
       [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩ ]tm
         ]tm ]tm]) ⊢ y ~ y'

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y, y': tm Γ Y
q₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
q₂: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f
r: Δ
⊢ ((((⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      ⟩
      ∈ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
      ⇒ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
        ⟩
        ∈ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ⇒ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩]
Δ ∧ (⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⇒ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f ⇒ y ~ y') ⊢ y ~ y'

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y, y': tm Γ Y
q₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
q₂: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f
r: Δ
⊢ ((((⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      ⟩
      ∈ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
      ⇒ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
        ⟩
        ∈ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ⇒ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩]
Δ ∧ (⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⇒ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f ⇒ y ~ y')
⊢ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y, y': tm Γ Y
q₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
q₂: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f
r: Δ
⊢ ((((⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      ⟩
      ∈ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
      ⇒ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
        ⟩
        ∈ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ⇒ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩]
Δ ∧ (⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⇒ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f ⇒ y ~ y')
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y, y': tm Γ Y
q₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
q₂: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f
r: Δ
⊢ ((((⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      ⟩
      ∈ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
      ⇒ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
        ⟩
        ∈ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ⇒ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩]
Δ ∧ (⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⇒ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f ⇒ y ~ y')
⊢ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y, y': tm Γ Y
q₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
q₂: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f
r: Δ
⊢ ((((⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      ⟩
      ∈ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
      ⇒ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
        ⟩
        ∈ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ⇒ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩]
Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f

      exact q₂.
    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y, y': tm Γ Y
q₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
q₂: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f
r: Δ
⊢ ((((⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      ⟩
      ∈ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
      ⇒ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
        ⟩
        ∈ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ⇒ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩]
Δ ∧ (⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⇒ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f ⇒ y ~ y')
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y, y': tm Γ Y
q₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
q₂: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ f
r: Δ
⊢ ((((⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      ⟩
      ∈ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
      ⇒ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
        π₂
          (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
        ⟩
        ∈ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ⇒ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y' ⟩]
Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

      exact q₁.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
x: tm Γ X
q: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
Δ
⊢ ∃h (⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

  
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
x: tm Γ X
q: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
Δ
⊢ ∃h (⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_dom_defined_law
   ∧ exp_partial_setoid_cod_defined_law
     ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq_defined_law
       ∧ exp_partial_setoid_unique_im_law
         ∧ exp_partial_setoid_im_exists_law) [f]
x: tm Γ X
q: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
Δ
⊢ ∃h (⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_dom_defined_law [f]
  ∧ exp_partial_setoid_cod_defined_law [f]
    ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq_defined_law [f]
      ∧ exp_partial_setoid_unique_im_law [f]
        ∧ exp_partial_setoid_im_exists_law [f]
x: tm Γ X
q: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
Δ
⊢ ∃h (⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_dom_defined_law [f]
  ∧ exp_partial_setoid_cod_defined_law [f]
    ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq_defined_law [f]
      ∧ exp_partial_setoid_unique_im_law [f]
        ∧ exp_partial_setoid_im_exists_law [f]
x: tm Γ X
q: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
r: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_im_exists_law [f]
Δ
⊢ ∃h (⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
q: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
r: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_im_exists_law [f]
Δ
⊢ ∃h (⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
q: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
r: Δ
⊢ (∀h (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
       ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm))) [f]
Δ
⊢ ∃h (⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
q: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
r: Δ
⊢ ∀h ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
       ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm))
      [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
q: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
r: Δ
⊢ ∀h ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
       ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm))
      [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩])
r':= forall_elim r x: Δ
⊢ ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
    ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ]tm))
   [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]
Δ
⊢ ∃h (⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
q: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
r: Δ
⊢ ∀h ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
       ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm))
      [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩])
r':= forall_elim r x: Δ
⊢ ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
    ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ]tm))
   [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]
Δ
∧ ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
    ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm))
   [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
q: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
r: Δ
⊢ ∀h ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
       ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm))
      [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩])
r':= forall_elim r x: Δ
⊢ ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
    ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ]tm))
   [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]
Δ
∧ ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
   [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ ]tm]
   ⇒ ∃h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
         [⟨ ⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
          (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩
          [⟨ ⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
              ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm]))
⊢ ∃h (⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
q: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
r: Δ
⊢ ∀h ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
       ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm))
      [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩])
r':= forall_elim r x: Δ
⊢ ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
    ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ]tm))
   [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]
Δ
∧ (x ~ x
   ⇒ ∃h (⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
         ∈ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm))
⊢ ∃h (⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
q: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
r: Δ
⊢ ∀h ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
       ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm))
      [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩])
r':= forall_elim r x: Δ
⊢ ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
    ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ]tm))
   [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]
Δ
∧ (x ~ x
   ⇒ ∃h (⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
         ∈ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)) ⊢ x ~ x

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
q: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
r: Δ
⊢ ∀h ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
       ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm))
      [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩])
r':= forall_elim r x: Δ
⊢ ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
    ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ]tm))
   [⟨ f [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]
Δ ⊢ x ~ x

    exact q.
  Qed.

  (** * 3. Pointwise equality of partial setoid functions *)
  Definition exp_partial_setoid_eq
    : form (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
    := let f := π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))) in
       let g := π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))) in
       let x := π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))) in
       let y := π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) in
       (∀h ∀h ((⟨ x , y ⟩ ∈ f) ⇔ (⟨ x , y ⟩ ∈ g))).

  
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g

  
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ
⊢ (∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                       ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                 ×h Y)) ⟩
           ∈ π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((ℙ (X ×h Y)
                           ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                         ×h Y))))
           ⇔ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                         ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                    ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
             ∈ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((ℙ (X ×h Y)
                             ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                           ×h Y))))))) [⟨ f, g ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g

X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                       ×h X) ×h Y))),

                    ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩

                          (((ℙ (X ×h Y)
                             ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                           ×h Y)))))
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, g ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g

p: Δ

⊢ (∀h ((⟨ π₂
            (π₁

Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g

                         ×h X) ×h Y)))))
       [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, g ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
p: Δ
⊢ ∀h (((⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                    ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂
          (tm_var
             (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
              ×h Y)) ⟩
        ∈ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                       ×h X) ×h Y))))
        ⇔ ⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                      ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                ×h Y)) ⟩
          ∈ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                         ×h X) ×h Y)))))
       [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, g ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
      [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
p': Δ
⊢ (((⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                ×h Y))),
     π₂
       (tm_var
          (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
     ⟩
     ∈ π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                    ×h X) ×h Y))))
     ⇔ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                   ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂
         (tm_var
            (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
             ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                      ×h X) ×h Y)))))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, g ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩]
Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
p: Δ
⊢ (((⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                ×h Y))),
     π₂
       (tm_var
          (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
     ⟩
     ∈ π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                    ×h X) ×h Y))))
     ⇔ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                  ×h Y))),
       π₂
         (tm_var
            (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
             ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                      ×h X) ×h Y)))))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, g ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩]
Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
p: Δ
⊢ (((⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                ×h Y))),
     π₂
       (tm_var
          (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
     ⟩
     ∈ π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                    ×h X) ×h Y))))
     ⇔ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                  ×h Y))),
       π₂
         (tm_var
            (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
             ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                      ×h X) ×h Y)))))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, g ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩]
Δ
∧ (((⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂
       (tm_var
          (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     ∈ π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                   ×h Y))))
     ⇔ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                  ×h Y))),
       π₂
         (tm_var
            (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
       ⟩
       ∈ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Y)))))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, g ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
p: Δ
⊢ (((⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                ×h Y))),
     π₂
       (tm_var
          (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
     ⟩
     ∈ π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                    ×h X) ×h Y))))
     ⇔ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                  ×h Y))),
       π₂

             ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                      ×h X) ×h Y)))))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, g ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩]
Δ ∧ (⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g) ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
p: Δ
⊢ (((⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                ×h Y))),
     π₂
       (tm_var
          (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
     ⟩
     ∈ π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                    ×h X) ×h Y))))
     ⇔ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                  ×h Y))),
       π₂
         (tm_var
            (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
             ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                      ×h X) ×h Y)))))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, g ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩]
Δ ∧ (⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g) ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
p: Δ
⊢ (((⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                ×h Y))),
     π₂
       (tm_var
          (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
     ⟩
     ∈ π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                    ×h X) ×h Y))))
     ⇔ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                  ×h Y))),
       π₂
         (tm_var
            (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
             ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                      ×h X) ×h Y)))))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, g ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩]
Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

    exact q.
  Qed.

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ (⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var

   π₂

                 ×h Y))))

                   ×h Y)))))
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))]
⊢ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ f [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
  ⇔ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    ∈ f [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm

    apply iff_refl.
  Qed.

          ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm))
⊢ ∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),

            (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),

                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                            ×h Y))))) ]tm))
⊢ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
  ⇔ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    ∈ f [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        ∈ f
          [π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
          ]tm
        ⇔ ⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          ∈ g
            [π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                            ×h Y))))) ]tm))
⊢ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
  ⇔ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    ∈ f [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm

Δ: form Γ

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        ∈ f
          [π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
          ]tm
        ⇔ ⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),

          ∈ g
            [π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                            ×h Y))))) ]tm))
⊢ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
  ⇔ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    ∈ f [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        ∈ f
          [π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
          ]tm
        ⇔ ⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          ∈ g
            [π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                            ×h Y))))) ]tm))
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(∀h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     ∈ f
       [π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
       ]tm
     ⇔ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ g
         [π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
         ]tm)) [⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
∀h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
    [⟨ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
     f
     [π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
     ]tm ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ⇔ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
      [⟨ ⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
       g
       [π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
       ]tm ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
 [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
  f
  [π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
  ]tm ⟩
  [⟨ ⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
 ⇔ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
    g
    [π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
    ]tm ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
[⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), y ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm

    apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, h ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g, h: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]
Δ
∧ (∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                      ×h Y))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                 ×h Y)) ⟩
           ∈ π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                          ×h X) ×h Y))))
           ⇔ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                         ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                   ×h Y)) ⟩
             ∈ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                            ×h X) ×h Y)))))))
  [⟨ f, g ⟩]
⊢ (∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                      ×h Y))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                 ×h Y)) ⟩
           ∈ π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                          ×h X) ×h Y))))
           ⇔ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                         ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                   ×h Y)) ⟩
             ∈ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                            ×h X) ×h Y)))))))
  [⟨ f, h ⟩]

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g, h: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]
Δ
∧ ∀h (∀h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
          [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                         ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂
               (tm_var

                   ×h Y)) ⟩,
           π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                        ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, g ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
          ⇔ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
            [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                           ×h X) ×h Y))),
               π₂
                 (tm_var
                    (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Y)) ⟩,
             π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                          ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩
             [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, g ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]))
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
          [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                         ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                   ×h Y)) ⟩,
           π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                        ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, h ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
          ⇔ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
            [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                           ×h X) ×h Y))),
               π₂
                 (tm_var
                    (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Y)) ⟩,
             π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                          ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩
             [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, h ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]))

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g, h: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]
((Δ
  ∧ ∀h (∀h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
            [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                           ×h X) ×h Y))),
               π₂
                 (tm_var
                    (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Y)) ⟩,
             π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((ℙ (...) ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X)
                         ×h Y)))) ⟩
             [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, g ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
            ⇔ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
              [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                             ×h X) ×h Y))),
                 π₂
                   (tm_var
                      (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                        ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((ℙ (...) ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X)
                           ×h Y)))) ⟩
               [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, g ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                  π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])))
 [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]) [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂
       (tm_var
          (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
   ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, h ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ⇔ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
    [⟨ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                  ×h Y))),
       π₂
         (tm_var
            (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
       ⟩,
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                 ×h Y)))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ f, h ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g, h: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]
Δ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))]
∧ ∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          ∈ f
            [π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                            ×h Y))))) ]tm
          ⇔ ⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩
            ∈ g
              [π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                              ×h Y))))) ]tm))
⊢ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ f [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
  ⇔ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    ∈ h [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm

            ⟩

                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                              ×h Y))))) ]tm))
⊢ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ f [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
  ⇔ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),

                              ×h Y))))) ]tm))

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g, h: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
Δ [γ]
∧ ∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          ∈ f
            [π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                            ×h Y))))) ]tm
          ⇔ ⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩
            ∈ g
              [π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                              ×h Y))))) ]tm))
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ h [γ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g, h: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        ∈ f
          [π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
          ]tm
        ⇔ ⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          ∈ g
            [π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                            ×h Y))))) ]tm)) ∧ Δ [γ]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ h [γ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g, h: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ∈ f
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
           ]tm
         ⇔ ⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
           ∈ g
             [π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                             ×h Y))))) ]tm)) ∧ Δ [γ])
∧ (∀h (⟨ π₂
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ f
         [π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
         ]tm
       ⇔ ⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ∈ g
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
           ]tm)) [⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ h [γ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g, h: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        ∈ f
          [π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
          ]tm
        ⇔ ⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          ∈ g
            [π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                            ×h Y))))) ]tm))
∧ Δ [γ]
  ∧ (∀h (⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ∈ f
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
           ]tm
         ⇔ ⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
           ∈ g
             [π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)
                             ×h Y))))) ]tm))
    [⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ h [γ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g, h: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
Δ [γ]
∧ (∀h (⟨ π₂
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ f
         [π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
         ]tm
       ⇔ ⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ∈ g
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
           ]tm)) [⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ h [γ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g, h: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
Δ [γ]
∧ ∀h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
      [⟨ ⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
       f
       [π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
       ]tm ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ⇔ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
        [⟨ ⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
         g
         [π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
         ]tm ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ h [γ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g, h: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
∀h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
    [⟨ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
     f
     [π₁

              (π₁

     ]tm ⟩

    ⇔ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))

       g

       ]tm ⟩

          [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
∧ Δ [γ] ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ h [γ ]tm

        g

∧ ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))

    f

(exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]) [γ]

((∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂

                 (tm_var

                     ×h Y))),
          π₂

               (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))

                  ×h Y)) ⟩

                (π₁
                   (π₁

                         (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                           ×h X) ×h Y)))))))
 [⟨ g, h ⟩]) [γ]

  ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ h [γ ]tm

q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
 [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
  g
  [γ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
   ]tm ]tm ⟩
  [⟨ ⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
 ⇔ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
    h
    [γ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
     ]tm ]tm ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
[⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), y ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
  ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ h [γ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g, h: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ h [γ ]tm
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
  ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ h [γ ]tm

    apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [g]

  
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [g]

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_dom_defined_law
   ∧ exp_partial_setoid_cod_defined_law
     ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq_defined_law
       ∧ exp_partial_setoid_unique_im_law
         ∧ exp_partial_setoid_im_exists_law) [g]

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_dom_defined_law [g]
  ∧ exp_partial_setoid_cod_defined_law [g]
    ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq_defined_law [g]
      ∧ exp_partial_setoid_unique_im_law [g]
        ∧ exp_partial_setoid_im_exists_law [g]

q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ
⊢ (∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
           ∈ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
           ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))))
  [g]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
          [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
           π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
          ⇒ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))
            [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ⇒ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))
    [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))
  [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ
[(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))) [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
 ]tm]
∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))
  [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

∧ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))

∧ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),

Δ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))]

  ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm ⊢ x ~ x

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [?f]
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm ⊢ ⟨ x, ?y ⟩ ∈ ?f

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
 exact (f [ γ ]tm).

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
 exact y.

X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))

q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f [γ ]tm]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
Δ [γ] ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f [γ ]tm]
