H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_cod_defined_law [g]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ
⊢ (∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
           ∈ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
           ⇒ π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
  [g]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
          [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
           π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
          ⇒ (π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
            [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ⇒ (π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
     π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
    [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
  [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

∧ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm

p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ
⊢ (∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h X)
                                   ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
                   π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)
                                 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                   ⇒ π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                            ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ⇒ ⟨ π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       (((... ×h X)
                                         ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h X)
                                 ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
                       ∈ π₁
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((((...) ×h X)
                                         ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
                       ⇒ ⟨ π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((((... ×h X)
                                         ×h X) ×h Y)
                                       ×h Y)))),
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)
                                 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                         ∈ π₁
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (π₁
                                      (tm_var
                                         ((((...) ×h X)
                                           ×h Y) ×h Y))))))))))
  [g]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h ((π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h X)
                                   ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
                   π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)
                                 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                         ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h Y)) ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ⟩]
                  ⇒ (π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                            ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                             ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                           ⟩
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                         ]tm,
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                              ×h Y)) ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ⟩]
                    ⇒ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
                      [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (π₁
                                      (tm_var
                                         (((... ×h X)
                                           ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
                         π₂
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((((ℙ (...) ×h X)
                                    ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                         ⟩,
                       π₁
                         (π₁
                            (π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((((...) ×h X)
                                       ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
                       ⟩
                       [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g
                                [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                                ]tm,
                              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                              [π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                              ]tm,
                            π₂
                              (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                            ⟩
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                   ×h Y)) ]tm,
                          π₂
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                          ⟩
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                                 ×h Y)) ]tm,
                        π₂
                          (tm_var
                             ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                              ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
                      ⇒ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
                        [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (π₁
                                     (tm_var
                                        ((((... ×h X)
                                           ×h X) ×h Y)
                                         ×h Y)))),
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)
                                   ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                           ⟩,
                         π₁
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((((...) ×h X)
                                         ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
                         ⟩
                         [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g
                                  [π₁
                                     (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                                  ]tm,
                                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                                [π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                                ]tm,
                              π₂
                                (tm_var
                                   ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
                              [π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                     ×h Y)) ]tm,
                            π₂
                              (tm_var
                                 (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                            ⟩
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                    ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                          π₂
                            (tm_var
                               ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]))))

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
(((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))])
 [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ⇒ (π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
     π₂
       (tm_var ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ⇒ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
      [⟨ ⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                          ×h Y))))),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
         ⟩,
       π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                      ×h Y))))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ]tm]
      ⇒ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
        [⟨ ⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                          ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
           ⟩,
         π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                        ×h Y))))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ]tm]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
(((((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))])
    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))])
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
  ∧ (π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   ((((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
 ∧ (π₂
      (π₁
         (tm_var
            ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                      ×h Y))))),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     ⟩,
   π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
   ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                   ×h Y)))),
     π₂
       (tm_var ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
     ⟩,
   π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
   ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]

 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~

  π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩

         (π₁
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
  ∈ g
    [π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
    ]tm
⊢ ⟨ π₂
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ g
    [π₁
       (π₁

    ]tm

((Δ
  [π₁

        (π₁
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))]
  ∧ π₂

∧ ⟨ π₂
      (π₁

  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
  ∈ g
    [π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁

tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Γ
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
((Δ [γ] ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ y₁ ~ y₂) ∧ ⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm
⊢ ?y ~ y₂

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
((Δ [γ] ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ y₁ ~ y₂) ∧ ⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ ?f, f [γ ]tm ⟩]

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

                             ×h Y)))),

               ⟩

                   (π₁

                         (tm_var
                            (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                             ×h Y))))

                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var

                               ×h Y)))),

                           (tm_var
                              (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y))))
                 ⇒ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h Y))) ~
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))))
  [g]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H

                          ×h Y))) ⟩,

                          (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                           ×h Y)))) ⟩
               [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
               ]tm]
              ⇒ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
                [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)
                                  ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ⟩,
                 π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                             ×h Y)))) ⟩
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 ]tm]
                ⇒ (π₂
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h Y))) ~
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩

                       ]tm,
                     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ⟩])))

Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ

q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

[π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]

  [⟨ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     ⟩,
   π₁
     (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
   ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ⇒ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
    [⟨ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩,
     π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
     ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ⇒ (π₂
         (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]

q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))])
 [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
 ∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      ⟩,
    π₁
      (π₁
         (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
    ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁
     (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
   ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
(Δ
 [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
  [(π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ]tm]
 ∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      ⟩,
    π₁
      (π₁
         (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
    ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁
     (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
   ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]

p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
(Δ [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
 ∧ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
   ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
     ]tm)
∧ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
    ]tm
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
 exact x.

X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y₁ ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm) ∧ ⟨ x, y₂ ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm
⊢ ⟨ x, y₁ ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f [γ ]tm, g [γ ]tm ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f [γ ]tm, g [γ ]tm ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y₁ ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm) ∧ ⟨ x, y₂ ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm
⊢ ⟨ x, y₂ ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
⟨ x, y₂ ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm ⊢ ⟨ x, y₂ ⟩ ∈ g [γ ]tm

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_im_exists_law [g]
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ
⊢ (∀h (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
       ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
             ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm))) [g]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ
⊢ ∀h ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
      [⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩]
      ⇒ ∃h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
            [⟨ ⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
             (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
             [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm
             ⟩
             [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]))

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
   π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
  [⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
   ⟩]
  ⇒ ∃h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
        [⟨ ⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
             [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
         (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))]
∧ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
   π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
  [⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
   ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
      [⟨ ⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
       (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ g [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])

p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)): tm (Γ ×h X) Γ
x:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)): tm (Γ ×h X) X
(Δ [γ] ∧ x ~ x) [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ ⟨ ?x [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ ?f [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm
⊢ (∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))]

x:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)): tm (Γ ×h X) X
tm (Γ ×h X) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
 exact (f [ γ ]tm).

∧ ⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩

  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ f [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
⊢ ∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ g
        [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ]tm)

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
(Δ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))]
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))))
∧ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ f [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
⊢ ∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ g
        [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ]tm)

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(Δ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))]
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))))
∧ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ f [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
⊢ ∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ g
        [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ]tm)

        
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(Δ [γ] ∧ x ~ x) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm
⊢ ∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ g
        [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        ]tm)

X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X

   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
   ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
     ]tm) [⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

X, Y: partial_setoid H

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y

⊢ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))), y ⟩
  ∈ g [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm

f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))

q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(Δ [γ] ∧ x ~ x) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ ?f

          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))

q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
 exact (f [ γ ]tm).

H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H

exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f [γ ]tm, g [γ ]tm ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f [γ ]tm, g [γ ]tm ⟩]

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(Δ [γ] ∧ x ~ x) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
f, g: tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  (** * 4. The partial setoid of functions *)
  Definition exp_partial_setoid_per_form
    : form (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
    := exp_partial_setoid_is_function [ π₁ (tm_var _) ]
       ∧
       exp_partial_setoid_eq.

  Arguments exp_partial_setoid_per_form /.

  
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
per_axioms exp_partial_setoid_per_form

  
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
per_axioms exp_partial_setoid_per_form

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
per_symm_axiom exp_partial_setoid_per_form
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
per_trans_axiom exp_partial_setoid_per_form

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
per_symm_axiom exp_partial_setoid_per_form
 
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((exp_partial_setoid_is_function
           [π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
           ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq)
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
           π₂
             (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
           ⟩]
          ⇒ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function
             [π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
             ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq)
            [⟨ π₂
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))),
             π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
             ⟩]))

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function
   [π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
   ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq)
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]
  ⇒ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function
     [π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
     ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq)
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))),
     π₂
       (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
     ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function
   [π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
   ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq)
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function
   [π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
   ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq)
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
   ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
(exp_partial_setoid_is_function
 [π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
 ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq)
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function
   [π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
   ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq)
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
   ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
exp_partial_setoid_is_function
[π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))]
∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function
  [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
  ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))),
     π₂
       (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
     ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
f:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))): tm ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
exp_partial_setoid_is_function
[π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))]
∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function
  [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
  ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))),
     π₂
       (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
     ⟩]

H: tripos

⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((exp_partial_setoid_is_function
               [π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
               ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq)
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                              ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                             ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                         ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
                 ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                             ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                            ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
                 π₂
                   (tm_var
                      (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                        ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
                 ⟩]
                ⇒ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function
                   [π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
                   ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq)
                  [⟨ π₂
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                                  ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                                 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))),
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                          ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
                   ⟩])))

  (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
h:= π₂
  (tm_var
     (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
      ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))): tm
  (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
(exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
 ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩])
∧ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [g]
  ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
f:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
            ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))): tm
  (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
g:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
         ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))): tm
  (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))

      ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))): tm
  (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]

⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

 ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩])
∧ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [g]
  ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
f:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((𝟙 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
            ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))): tm

      ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))): tm

  (ℙ (X ×h Y))

⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ g, h ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
per (ℙ (X ×h Y))

  
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
per (ℙ (X ×h Y))

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
form (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
per_axioms ?e

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
form (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
 exact exp_partial_setoid_per_form.
    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
per_axioms exp_partial_setoid_per_form
 exact exp_partial_setoid_per_axioms.
  Defined.

X, Y: partial_setoid H
partial_setoid H

X, Y: partial_setoid H
partial_setoid H

X, Y: partial_setoid H
ty H
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
per ?X

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ty H
 exact (ℙ (X ×h Y)).
    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
per (ℙ (X ×h Y))
 exact exp_partial_setoid_per.
  Defined.

  (** * 5. Accessors for the partial equivalence relation of functions *)
  
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
f, g: tm Γ exp_partial_setoid
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
Δ ⊢ f ~ g

  
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
f, g: tm Γ exp_partial_setoid
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
Δ ⊢ f ~ g

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
f, g: tm Γ exp_partial_setoid
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
Δ
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function
   [π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
   ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq) [⟨ f, g ⟩]

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
f, g: tm Γ exp_partial_setoid
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
Δ
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
  ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
f, g: tm Γ exp_partial_setoid
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
f, g: tm Γ exp_partial_setoid
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]

    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
f, g: tm Γ exp_partial_setoid
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
 exact p.
    
H: tripos
X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
f, g: tm Γ exp_partial_setoid
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
 exact q.
  Qed.

X, Y: partial_setoid H
Γ: ty H
f, g: tm Γ exp_partial_setoid
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ f ~ g
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

f ~ g ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

Γ: ty H
f, g: tm Γ exp_partial_setoid
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ f ~ g
(exp_partial_setoid_is_function
 [π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
 ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq) [⟨ f, g ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

Δ: form Γ

exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f, g ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

    apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

End ExponentialPartialSetoid.

Arguments exp_partial_setoid_per_form {H} X Y /.
Arguments exp_partial_setoid_is_function {H X Y}.
Arguments exp_partial_setoid_eq {H X Y}.
